pull.title: util: Remove unused (u)int64_t formatting macros
pull.body:
We should anyway prefer to use the predefined macros from <inttypes.h>.

If I haven't missed anything, this removes the last OS-specific #if, leaving us only with compiler-specific #if(def)s.

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

events.message:
util: Remove unused (u)int64_t formatting macros

We should anyway prefer to use the predefined macros from <inttypes.h>.

If I haven't missed anything, this removes the last OS-specific #if,
leaving us only with compiler-specific #if(def)s.

events.body:
utACK 980c08df80aa1698bf7e8f1f4f8ecf20078535a8

Seems like those macros haven't been used anyway for almost 10 years... (last use was removed in #215 / 8956111802e07bfd0901bd8c85f9521b478c73d8).
